programme.desc: When a woman's husband is murdered and she is left penniless, she must face returning to the bad neighborhood she worked so hard to flee.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a melancholy woman races against time to fulfill a promise she made to her father 45 years earlier.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When an honest man makes a desperate mistake, he must face dire consequences that put his entire family in danger.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must help a troubled young boy who wants to divorce his parents.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels attempt to save a troubled marriage when the neglected wife encounters a man with whom she was once in love.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: At a time when the country is on the brink of peace, Monica brings a group of Northern Ireland teenagers, both Protestant and Catholic, to America to discover the true meaning of peace.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels set out for a night of bowling and find enough needy patrons to "spare."

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels visit an art gallery where they help three people in need.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: On the eve of a boy's bar mitzvah, he and his agnostic grandfather must come to terms with what it means to become a man.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is scandalized by the new liberated lifestyle her sister has adopted as a suffragette.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully and Brian forge a true father-son bond.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The government puts a price on Sully’s head when he organizes an escape for Cloud Dancing that results in a deadly massacre.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Everyone but Michaela assumes that Sully is dead when he disappears after a fight with his nemesis, Sgt. O’Connor.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully struggles to survive in the wilderness as Dr. Mike desperately searches for him.

programme.title: 7 Assassins
programme.desc: When gold goes missing in ancient China, royal guards entrusted with its recovery realize they are not the only people in pursuit.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: Liu Jin-xi (Donnie Yen) is a village craftsman whose quiet life is irrevocably shattered by the arrival of two notorious gangsters in the local general store.

programme.title: Kill Zone
programme.desc: An inspector and his unit are after a crime boss and are willing to capture him at all costs. The crime boss enlists his top henchmen to end their dirty schemes.

programme.title: Man Of Tai Chi
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves makes his directorial debut in this explosive martial arts drama that reunites him with legendary Matrix Trilogy fight choreographer Yuen Wo Ping and stuntman Tiger Chen.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: A young girl learns to fight from watching TV and the fighters at the boxing school next door. She sets upon a violent quest to collect payment for her ailing mother's medical expenses which ultimately leads her to her father, a member of the Yakuza.

programme.title: Raging Phoenix
programme.desc: A violent Thai gang is abducting and killing women around Thailand. Sanim and his friends, having had loved ones abducted, have joined together to break up the gang of kidnappers. In a botched kidnap attempt, Deu (JeeJa Yanin) is saved by Sanim's crew.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.desc: Daphne's attempts to lift Frasier's spirits by taking him to her favorite British pub backfires when Frasier decides to become a regular at "her" hangout.

programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a dinner theater at the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob takes his friends to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Cleo enlists Deuce and Frankie to help train her new pet snake, Hissette; the task is more challenging than they expect; Finnegan must overcome self-doubt and impress a raging kraken to become Monster High's band leader.

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: When Toralei's mom, Catarina Stripe, substitute teaches at Monster High, Toralei and Clawdeen become unlikely partners. Catarina proposes a monstrous trade: the Moon Claw for Selena Wolf's diary, which may hold the key to Selena's return.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: After making a deal with Dad, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkleberg; Timmy wishes for 5,000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Carlitos pierde su primera tarjeta de la biblioteca, teme haber perdido “su ventana al mundo”. / Para conseguir un poco de calma, Angélica convence a los bebés de “retirarse”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica juega a la psicóloga con los bebés, pero su consejo le sale al revés. / Cuando Carlitos comienza a estornudar siempre que Kimi aparece, teme que pueda ser alérgico a ella.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Chas y Kira contratan a un experto en Feng Shui para aumentar los clientes del café, y los bebés los ayudan a su manera. / Los bebés creen que el acuario en forma de bote que visitarán se hundirá y deben hacer algo para mantenerlo a flote.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando los papás se quedan a cargo, los bebés intentan ayudarlos, pero les complican las cosas. / Los bebés creen que Dil se convirtió en un muñeco luego de que Angélica lo reemplazara por el suyo para ganar una exposición.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica cree que la nueva empleada del café es su muñeca Cynthia que cobró vida. / Angélica promete ser buena con los bebés para siempre si Fili acepta que unas niñas de cuatro años jueguen al “niño bonito” con él.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los misterios abundan cuando los bebés y sus padres acompañan a Boris y a Minka en su segunda luna de miel: un viaje de noche en tren a Little Biendletown.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Didi anuncia que regresará a la escuela, Angélica convence a los bebés de que el tiempo irá para atrás. / Cuando Carlitos se despierta de una siesta sin sueños, los bebés deciden buscar su sueño perdido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Hugo cree que Dil comenzó a caminar, los padres recuerdan los primeros pasos de sus hijos, mientras los niños los recuerdan de manera diferente. / Angélica contrata a Harold para que sea su asistente personal.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando los cachorros de Firulais y Fifi son puestos en adopción, Hugo le ruega a Didi que se queden con uno. / Los bebés se embarcan en una fantasía, batallando a la “Malvada señorita Angelique” en una exótica tienda de mascotas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés intentan levantarle el ánimo a su nueva niñera Taffy. / Angélica hace que los bebés actúen su propia versión de un espectáculo de acción y aventura de los 70’, pero ellos tienen sus propias ideas para jugar a la fantasía.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La pandilla entera se dirige al “Club Fred”, un lugar para descansar y relajarse. Una vez en el paraíso, los bebés deben encontrar el tesoro de Barba Azul para salvarle las vacaciones a todos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Lili está preocupada porque no es tan perfecta como debería y termina descubriendo que disfruta ser quien es, más que ser quien debería ser.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats descubren que la Navidad significa más que regalos y tradiciones, cuando se encuentran atrapados en las decoraciones navideñas de Hugo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats descubren que la Navidad significa más que regalos y tradiciones, cuando se encuentran atrapados en las decoraciones navideñas de Hugo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando llevan a los bebés al circo, Carlitos teme convertirse en un payaso. / Cuando Angélica ve una entrega de premios en televisión, los bebés deciden hacer su propia entrega de “premios”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés encuentran una galería de juegos medievales que los lleva a una fantasía para salvar a Taffy de un feroz dragón llamado Gracko. / Los bebés intentan hacer más fuerte a Dil para que pueda jugar con ellos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Taffy lleva a los bebés a un juego de básquet y ellos defienden a la mascota del equipo visitante: un bicho gigante. / Angélica convence a los bebés de que el corralito de los Pickles es su área de juegos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Kimi es elegida para una audición para una película, y le dicen que será una estrella. Los bebés creen que vivirá en el cielo. / Los bebés piensan que Taffy y Angélica intercambiaron identidades.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo diseña un sistema de vigilancia en video para cuidar niños, mientras ve un festival de cine de ficción en televisión. / Cuando Taffy lleva a los bebés al parque, Fili conoce a Dusty, un joven “artista de la recolección de basura”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El cachorro de los Finster está aletargado y los bebés creen que es porque aún no le dieron un nombre. / Una amiga de Betty viene de visita con su hija Alice, justo cuando los reportes climáticos predicen un huracán, también llamado Alice.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo, Chas, Angélica y Susie ingresan a sus mascotas a un concurso para disputarse el premio de “Mejor Mascota”. / Taffy lleva a los bebés a su primera visita a un restaurante de comida rápida.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando los bebés acompañan a sus mamás a la venta anual para bebés, los Rugrats creen que serán vendidos. / Los bebés hacen un bebé de nieve y lo llaman Steve.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy pierde la paciencia luego de resbalarse en un juego, y Angélica desafía a los bebés a pruebas de valor para ver quién es el más “valiente”. / Didi lleva a los bebés a la universidad. Ellos se escapan y viven una aventura en el campus.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que los papás están buscando la fuente de la juventud para volver a ser niños. / Para el cumpleaños de Kimi, sus padres organizan una fiesta especial, pero Hugo lleva a los bebés a un club gótico.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: En el primer cumpleaños de Tommy, él y sus amiguitos deciden que quieren ser perros. Creyendo que comiendo la comida de su mascota se convertirán en perros, ellos comandan a una nave a control remoto para conseguirla.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja compra músculos inflables para verse mejor. / Bob y Patricio derriten una estatua de cera de Calamardo y creen que lo mataron, Calamardo sale del baño y les hace creer que es su fantasma.

programme.desc: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.desc: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!

programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: For people who live on active volcanoes, life has an element of impermanence to it. There is always the fear that one day their turn will come, and their home will be in the path of the volcano.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: Explore the tallest towers, the biggest palaces, the grandest tombs and ancient temples that were forgotten for centuries. This episode shows how technique, technology, and ambition have developed some of the most magnificent structures in the world.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: The human race is constantly looking for a better way to get from point A to point B. From tall ships to the invention of the automobile, travel has always been a necessity.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: People have labored on some gigantic undertakings such as roads, bridges, and canals that link oceans. These feats of engineering have allowed cities to grow, but now they are also allowing us to travel into space.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: For as long as man has been alive, he has fought to defend what is rightfully his and fought even harder to take what is not. He soon figured out, the man with the biggest weapon has the advantage.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: People aren't the only ones that need to travel. Our way of life has always relied on the transportation of cargo, freight and raw materials. Transport has needed to evolve to keep up with the demand.

programme.title: Supersize Structures
programme.desc: Mankind has proved time and time again that they are more than capable of dreaming big. Ferocious ambition has produced both world-renowned monuments and monumental gaffs.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Building structures and machines to harness water.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Building for God reached a high point in the Middle Ages with Notre Dame.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Awe-inspiring palaces are the legacy that demonstrates the brilliance of Islamic engineers.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: The first data-recording device from over 5,000 years ago; how weaving creates binary code.

programme.title: Southland Tales
programme.desc: SOUTHLAND TALES is an ensemble piece set in the futuristic landscape of Los Angeles, as it stands on the brink of social, economic and environmental disaster. Boxer Santaros (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson) is an action star who's stricken with amnesia.

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed film chronicles the true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered a decades-long cover-up of child abuse within the local Catholic Archdiocese.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate a murder while pursuing their other full-time professions. Welcome to Hollywood Homicide - the only place where you can come to work hungry, horny, thirsty, and broke, and resolve all four by the end of the watch.

programme.title: Billboard Dad
programme.desc: To cheer up their widowed father, a workaholic artist named Max, Tess and Emily Tyler take out a personal ad on a Los Angeles billboard. Although Max receives an overwhelming number of responses, magic strikes when he meets Brooke Anders.

programme.title: Switching Goals
programme.desc: They may look identical, but these high-spirited twins differ wildly. Teen superstars Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen executive produce and star in the comedy of two sisters who hatch the ultimate scheme to find out how their other half lives.

programme.title: Passport to Paris
programme.desc: Twins from California embark on a whirlwind rendezvous with adventure. They shop at Parisian boutiques, visit the Cathedral of Notre Dame, and dine at the Eiffel Tower. The pair even finds time to help their grandpa with official ambassadorial business.

programme.title: New York Minute
programme.desc: On the way to a crucial college interview, disciplined, tidy Jane is thwarted by her free-spirited, impulsive, untidy sister Roxy, prompting an unfortunate series of mishaps that almost ruin everything.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?
programme.desc: John Clark is a meek workaholic who feels trapped in a dull, mind-numbing existence. One night, his whole life changes after the sight of a beautiful dance instructor inspire him to break out of his mold and sign up for some fancy footwork.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: Comedy sensation Mike Myers stars with Nancy Travis in this hatchet-driven romantic comedy about a wedlock-shy coffee house poet who finally meets the perfect woman. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?
programme.desc: John Clark is a meek workaholic who feels trapped in a dull, mind-numbing existence. One night, his whole life changes after the sight of a beautiful dance instructor inspire him to break out of his mold and sign up for some fancy footwork.

programme.title: Obvious Child

programme.title: Hell Fest
programme.desc: A serial killer in costume at a Halloween theme park kills off visitors, unbeknownst to bystanders who think it's part of the fun.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia Ciudad Violeta , nuestros héroes llegan a un valle donde los Donphan suelen cosechar sus preciosas piedras. No hace falta decir que los villanos del Equipo Rocket no están lejos de ellos.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El bosque puede ser un lugar temible por la noche, ¡especialmente si estás perdido! Nuestros héroes necesitarán algo de ayuda para salir de este embrollo. ¡Hoothoot, al rescate!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su primera parada en una ciudad desde Pueblo New Bark, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a que la compañía de baile de un inseguro Bellossom recupere la confianza y participe en su próxima exhibición.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos llegan a un pueblo acechado por crímenes que imitan a un legendario ladrón maestro. La esperanza del pueblo yace en estos jóvenes Entrenadores... ¿Detendrán a este dúo criminal y a su Meowth cómplice?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando nuestros héroes devuelven a un infeliz Snubbull a su acaudalada Entrenadora, inicia una serie de eventos que cambiarán por siempre la vida del Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Brock descubre a un Stantler herido y asustado en un parque cercano, decide cuidarlo hasta curarlo. Pero con Jessie, James y Meowth tras ellos, ¿podrá mantener al Stantler a salvo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Aún en camino hacia Ciudad Violeta, Ash se encuentra con un Chikorita salvaje y trata de atraparlo. Chikorita demuestra ser un oponente más duro de lo que pensaba, y las cosas sólo empeoran con la llegada del Equipo Rocket…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Durante otra emboscada del Equipo Rocket, un joven Entrenador y su Ledyba ayudan a nuestros héroes a derrotarlos. Pero, en medio del caos, su Ledyba se separa del grupo, ¿dónde podrá estar?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El último invento del Equipo Rocket será un éxito… ¡hasta que Togepi y su nuevo amigo Sentret se lo llevan de paseo!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Assigned the task of capturing the importance of the Stargate program, a documentary crew is given a true look at the heroic nature and family-like bond of the soldiers of Stargate Command, when a key member of the SGC is killed in action.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is sent to investigate the murder of a group of rogue NID scientists. They discover that results of the scientists' experiments may have combined DNA to create the ultimate evil: a human being that possesses the conscience of a Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On his first day in office, the newly elected president of the United States is told about the Stargate program and must be brought up to speed on the past seven years of its existence. Starring Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill allows the knowledge of the Ancients to be downloaded into his mind again, even though the first time almost killed him. While he slowly deteriorates, he and SG-1 must race against time to uncover the secret of the Lost City of the Ancients.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Carter and Teal'c fly to the Asgard world of Hala in hopes of finding a way to revive O'Neill, they are attacked by Replicators, who take Carter prisoner. Meanwhile, Dr. Weir and Jackson attempt to negotiate a treaty with Goa'uld System Lords.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary dabbles with Dave's dark arts in Torrence, Calif.; Kenny takes some excavation lessons; Brandi and Jarrod quit horsing around long enough to stumble across a wartime oddity.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny bids on a massive locker; Rene and Casey attempt to go small; Shana and Edwina's mystery box is mislabeled.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie encounter an unexpected friend, but must also confront an unbeatable enemy from their past, while The Widow makes an unholy alliance.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny confronts his inner demons while his friends struggle to help him. The Widow exacts revenge on her enemies with help from a new, deadly partner.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny plays a dangerous game, causing his friends to question his loyalty. The Widow discovers the existence of a new weapon as her alliance falters.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode, Sunny relies on an unlikely person to help him defeat a common foe, while Bajie discovers a shocking secret from his past.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: In the bloody season finale, Sunny faces the toughest showdown of his life, while Bajie's loyalties are tested to their limits.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie seek help from Lydia. The Widow struggles to control M.K. Pilgrim seeks to establish a new order in the Badlands.

programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie go undercover on The Widow's frontlines, seeking passage to a possible cure for Henry. Tilda confronts The Widow.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the 'Glimmerberry Gathering,' until she learns the true meaning behind the festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While building a new Dog Park, Huck finds the Good Luck Charm that Cherry wrongly believes gives her the ability to sing difficult notes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & Friends go on an overnight campout, Ginger Snap doesn’t want them to find out, she’s afraid of the dark!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Strawberry finds herself in charge of the upcoming BerryFest parade, she hopes her gal pals can help her with the overwhelming amounts of chores. But each of them is rather demanding and ungracious, so they're no use at all.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Unable to sleep with the noise of an all-night construction crew of Berrykins trying to get the power turned back on, Strawberry and the girls go on a campout.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Blueberry gives a First Frost Day 'secret' gift that's more what she wants than what her giftee wants, a hot-potato of passing on the unwanted gift occurs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The beginning of winter brings a brief spell of springlike weather, ruining everyone's hopes for winter fun. With help from Strawberry, the community adapts to the changing conditions.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling 'Tall Tales.'

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's 'mood hair' runs amok.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry spends all her time emulating her literary detective hero and ignores her friends, until Strawberry gives her a 'missing person case' to solve—the missing person being Blueberry herself!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Just as the girls are about to enjoy a vacation at their homemade resort, TV host Mavis Maraschino shows up to do a segment on Cherry Jam and disrupts their plans.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything 'just so' — and when things don’t go her way, she’s a pretty bad sport.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Drafted by the girls to play Prince Berry Charming in a community play, Huck pushes aside his reluctance and tries to not disappoint them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the town needs a larger venue for their upcoming Glimmerberry Ball, Plum finds an ideal hollow tree for the occasion.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Sour teasing Apple escalates into a 'prank war' between the two of them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City holds an election to see who will fill in as 'BerryFest Princess' while Princess Berrykin is absent.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City holds its first talent show. When the girls discover a talent scout will attend, Lemon decides she has to perform without any help from her friends, even though they are all helping each other.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the town’s very formal Berry Bitty Buggy Derby is revived, the girls are unfamiliar with the traditional behavior for the event.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry’s open window.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe and Piper are lured to the dark side and relish their new evil powers when a shapeshifting warlock tricks Prue into a shot-gun wedding in an effort to steal the Book of Shadows.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe somehow becomes psychically and physically linked with the violent past of an Old West ghost town complete with horses, petticoats, cowboys and six-shooters and Prue must go back in time to save her sister from a horrifying fate.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper is praying for a demon-free wedding day, but Prue's astral self has other plans as dreams take her into a wild world without rules and responsibility that affect reality when the police arrest Prue on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue is tired of losing her battle to save innocents, and in her effort to fight off the Angel of Death, she has to turn her back on a dying soul when she accepts that she can't fight fate and reconciles with the death of her mother.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper and Leo feel lack of privacy and decide to move to a rented apartment. When they tell Prue and Phoebe, the Halliwell sisters recall their troubled relationship with their grandmother Penny before they acknowledge that they were The Charmed Ones

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon wielding the seven deadly sins uses his powers against The Charmed Ones, and after only a few hours exposed to Pride, Gluttony, Lust and Sloth, Phoebe, Prue, Piper, and Leo may self-destruct.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Cole officially joins the good fight when he goes undercover in an underworld brotherhood to help Prue, Phoebe, Piper, and Leo learn more about the evil. Their trust in him falters when it looks as though they are being double-crossed.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe is worried when her love, Cole stays undercover in a demon Brotherhood, but the danger turns dire when Cole's old mentor plots to bring out his evil side and turn his massive powers against the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Verónica y horas más tarde recibe una carta de Gabriela donde dice: “Te perdono”. Constanza quiere demostrar que Antonia es cómplice de Aníbal Villegas. El senador tiene las cuentas congeladas. Guerra prepara una coartada.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Gabriela y se ofrece para reparar el daño, atestiguando en contra de Antonia. Lagarto también podría ser un testigo clave. Ricardo hace el amor con Inés y les toman fotografías. Patricia recibe las fotos y llora de rabia.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: En medio del funeral, Benito arma un escándalo, le reclama a Ruth por dejar sola a Raquel y le dice que ella no tiene derecho a disponer de la fortuna. Ruth presenta a su verdadera madre.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Dan lectura al testamento de Raquel, la sorpresa es general cuando nombran heredera universal a Eva. Don Martín tiene planes de escapar del hospital psiquiátrico, busca ayuda para salir.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Dínora siente que el tiempo se le agota, piensa en matar a Gabriela si no firma los poderes. Una enfermera ficticia toma la silla de ruedas de Martín y lo ayuda a fugarse del psiquiátrico.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le pide a Paula que se vaya de la hacienda, pero ella se niega a irse. Esteban provoca a Juan y este reacciona con violencia, ya que no logra controlar sus celos. A Julieta se le intensifica su dolor de cabeza y sigue con su camino lleno de venganzas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula confiesa su amor a Juan, pero él le pide renunciar al dinero y a Esteban, como una prueba de lealtad. Ella no puede cumplirle, decide empacar y marcharse lejos. Julieta recibe el terrible diagnóstico y lo mantiene en secreto.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar termina por ceder a los sueños de Lupe dándole una tregua, todo por un reclamo de Beatriz. Juan se arrepiente de enamorarse de Paula, mientras que a ella la invade la tristeza. A Julieta no le queda mucho tiempo. Esteban aumenta su ambición.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le ruega a Juan que vuelva con Julieta, porque a su lado sólo sufrirá en medio de sus confusiones y compromisos. Él, furioso, busca a Julieta y le pide que se reconcilien y, aunque ella duda sobre la decisión, finalmente lo hacen oficial.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza arremete contra Aníbal y jura llevarlo ante la justicia. El senador Villegas pide perdón y se queja de su salud. Antonia y Verónica saben que la guerra está declarada. Rodrigo duda de la identidad de Dantés. David y Cecilia se reconcilian.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza enfrenta a Antonia delante de todos. La acusa de beneficiarse de su encierro y del de Gabriela para apoderarse del Chamuco. Guerra encuentra una nueva aliada. Aníbal se recupera de su infarto y ya no es senador. La salud de Lucía empeora.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jerry Van Dyke, brother of Dick Van Dyke guest stars as a carnival's destitute banjo player. He also proves to be an inept lawman when he is hired in Barney's Fife's absence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's son, Opie, demands that their new housekeeper, Andy's aunt, be fired after the old one leaves to get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives the state troopers a lesson in the efficiency of a county sheriff when a dangerous criminal escapes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
